archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Mobile Marketplace)

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto bg-slate-50 min-h-screen relative shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden
layout.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-200/50 pb-6 pt-3 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50
layout.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]

buttons.primary: w-full bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-xl py-4 font-semibold text-base flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-900 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 font-medium active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.icon_button: p-3 rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm border border-slate-100 text-slate-900

components.category_icon_wrapper: w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-700 active:scale-95 transition-transform
components.badges: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-slate-100 text-slate-800
components.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100 px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between

images.description: Technician with tools (use for AC/Repair banner)

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='role-selector-customer').

instructions_to_main_agent: Design the UI using React.js and Tailwind CSS mapped perfectly to mimic a mobile app (PWA layout). Use the layout.container classes (`max-w-md mx-auto`) to confine it to mobile proportions on desktop.
Ensure all components are written in `.js`/`.jsx`, not TypeScript.
Implement bottom sheet navigation (like Swiggy/Urban Company) using absolute positioning at bottom, glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl`), and fixed width `max-w-md`.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions like Drawers/Dialogs for the booking flow.
Implement the Two-Tap Rule: Browsing to booking should be extremely frictionless.
Ensure Hindi/Indian context by using ₹ (INR) currency formatting throughout the app.
For the Map UI/Live Tracking, if a real map library isn't available, build a beautiful mock UI using an image background with a pulsing dot and an ETA card hovering over it.
Technician dashboard needs clear data visuals (Shadcn Recharts) and a prominent 'Go Online/Offline' toggle button.
Apply 'data-testid' to EVERY button, input, and critical navigational element.
